---
id: join-subdevice
title: "Start Sub-device Joining"
description: "Call this API to start pairing a Zigbee or Matter gateway with a sub-device."
sidebar_label: "Start Sub-device Joining"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Start Sub-device Joining"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/gateways/subdevices/join"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Call this API to start pairing a Zigbee or Matter gateway with a sub-device.

:::tip
Before getting started, please ensure the sub-device is in pairing mode.
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["gatewayId","commandCode"],"properties":{"gatewayId":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway ID"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","enum":["APIEnableSubdeviceJoining","APIBindBleDeviceToHub","APIPushMatterBindInfo"],"description":"Command codes for sub-device joining:\n- `APIEnableSubdeviceJoining`: Standard Zigbee device joining (e.g. triggered by pressing a button to enter join mode)\n- `APIBindBleDeviceToHub`: Zigbee device joining using MagicPair technology\n- `APIPushMatterBindInfo`: Matter device joining   \n"},"data":{"type":"object","description":"Network joining parameters (JSON object). Depending on the commandCode, the required parameters are as follows:\n- `APIEnableSubdeviceJoining`: No need to provide this field.\n- `APIBindBleDeviceToHub`: Required. Data structure: {\"shortAddr\":65534,\"mac\":\"54EF4410003604C9\",\"manufacturerCode\":4447,\"fwVer\":\"0.0.0_0030\",\"model\":\"lumi.light.acn014\",\"did\":\"lumi.54ef4410003604c9\",\"devType\":142,\"hdVer\":1,\"zbVer\":\"3\",\"pid\":\"lumi1.54ef442dcd15\"}\n- `APIPushMatterBindInfo` s: Required. Data structure: {\"code\":\"11-digit Matter pairing code of the subdevice\"}\n"}},"title":"SubdeviceJoinRequest"},"examples":{"zigbeeJoin":{"summary":"Standard Zigbee device pairing (e.g., triple-click to join)","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIEnableSubdeviceJoining"}},"magicpairJoin":{"summary":"Zigbee device pairing using MagicPair technology","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIBindBleDeviceToHub","data":{"shortAddr":65534,"mac":"54EF4410003604C9","manufacturerCode":4447,"fwVer":"0.0.0_0030","model":"lumi.light.acn014","did":"lumi.54ef4410003604c9","devType":142,"hdVer":1,"zbVer":"3","pid":"lumi1.54ef442dcd15"}}},"matterJoin":{"summary":"Matter device pairing","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIPushMatterBindInfo","data":{"code":"04036408297"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}
